{{CargoRelic
|name=Tangram
|class_id=22006
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=04-23
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Apr 23, 1753 AD, Tangram was taken to Europe by an Arabian merchant.<br>Tangram is a traditional puzzle toy in China, very popular among the Chinese folks. Tangram can be broken into seven pieces, including a square, five triangles of different sizes, and a parallelogram. In the eighteenth century, Tangram was taken to the western world, stirring up a phenomenon. The westerners called it the Tangram and would stay up all night playing it. Allan Pole, an American writer ordered a set of ivory Tangram. Napoleon killed time with Tangram during his exile.
|fame=45
|art=26
|fth=20
|civ=30
|tech=33
|ss1=Refine +1 White Demon God Material +1%
|ss2=Refine +1 White Demon God Material +2%
|ss3=Refine +1 White Demon God Material +3%
|ss4=Refine +1 White Demon God Material +5%
|ss7=Refine +1 White Demon God Material +5%<br>Refine +1 White Demon God Material +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail RUSH +20
}}
